metadata.description: TruePointAgents marketplace hosting the model-effort-router Claude Code skill.

plugins.name: model-effort-router
plugins.description: Routes every delegated task to the cheapest model tier that can do it well (light/standard/deep/frontier), escalates only on evidence within a hard attempt budget that can never loop, adapts automatically when models are added, renamed, or removed, and makes agents cooperate: cheap scouts feed context to bigger workers, every escalation hands forward the failure evidence, and verification is always done by fresh eyes.
